profile_backing.command: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-pass156 rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/(cholesky_1024|qr_1024|lu_1024|eig_48|matmul_2d_1024|pinv_192)' --sample-size 10 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 3

candidate.lever: reuse Cholesky L21 and L21T scratch buffers across blocked panels
candidate.description: Moved only the allocation lifetime of the blocked Cholesky panel buffers out of the panel loop. The candidate kept the existing L21 row-major values, L21T transposed layout, matmul_2d(L21, L21T) Schur product, and A22 subtraction loop.

proof_test.command: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-pass156-test rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-lax --lib cholesky -- --nocapture
proof_test.details: 12 tests passed in candidate state, including cholesky_blocked_matches_scalar_and_reconstructs, cholesky_real_fast_path_bit_identical_to_complex_path, NaN/non-square behavior, and triangular_solve_cholesky_roundtrip.

rebench.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-pass156-after cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/(cholesky_1024|lu_1024|qr_1024|matmul_2d_1024)' --sample-size 10 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 3

isomorphism_proof.ordering: Candidate changed allocation lifetime only. Panel loop order, diagonal block factorization, panel solve order, L21 row-major layout, L21T transposed layout, matmul_2d dimensions/call, A22 subtraction order, and final strict-upper zeroing were unchanged.
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking: N/A: Cholesky has no pivot or comparison tie-breaking surface.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: Candidate used the same product kernel and subtraction loop; no reassociation, no FMA forcing, no mixed precision, and no algorithmic order change.
isomorphism_proof.rng: N/A: Cholesky consumes no random state.
isomorphism_proof.errors: No public error path changed in candidate state; final production source was restored.

validation.command: RCH focused cargo test -p fj-lax --lib cholesky -- --nocapture
RCH fixed-worker Criterion target and guard benches
validation.result: candidate regressed Cholesky1024 and guard rows

next_primitive: Do not retune Cholesky scratch allocation. Attack a deeper algorithmic primitive next: recursive/cache-oblivious Cholesky with packed panel solve plus tolerance proof, or CA-QR/TSQR if restored-source reprofile moves QR above Cholesky.
